positive: A symmetrical, stylized celestial forest scene. The composition features interlocking geometric flora and bioluminescent fauna rendered in a deep indigo and emerald palette. The central motif is a glowing, stylized crescent moon surrounded by intricate, branching fractal vines and silhouetted mythological animals (like stylized griffin wings or celestial deer). Style: Art Nouveau meets modern vector line art, high contrast, clean silhouette, detailed ornamental quality. Lighting: Dramatic backlighting with deep shadows, emphasizing glowing edges (rim lighting). Suitable for a distressed screen print on apparel. Full color saturation, maximalist details, perfect symmetry, flat color application.
negative: blurry, noisy, low contrast, watermark, logo, text, grain, signature, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoon, photorealistic, childish, dirty, grime, bokeh
